info.title: Ishraf Platform Backend API
info.description: Complete API documentation for the ready backend modules. Paginated list endpoints now return data.items + data.pagination.

tags.name: Homework
tags.description: Homework management and student homework endpoints.

tags.name: Reporting
tags.description: Wave 1 reporting and parent/supervisor dashboard additions.

CreateTeacherAssignmentRequest.description: teacherId is the teachers.id value, not users.id.

CreateSupervisorAssignmentRequest.description: supervisorId is the supervisors.id value, not users.id.

get.description: Checks database readiness and returns 503 when the service is not ready to accept traffic.

post.description: Authenticates a user using email or phone and returns both access and refresh tokens. Login is rate-limited to five failed attempts per 15 minutes per IP and identifier.
Accepts a refresh token, revokes it, and issues a new access token and refresh token.
Revokes the current refresh token. This endpoint is idempotent and does not require an access token.

401.description: Current password is incorrect or access token is invalid

post.description: Admin-only endpoint. Creates a user and its role-specific profile inside a single transaction.

409.description: Duplicate email, phone, or role-specific unique field

get.description: Admin-only endpoint. Returns users with a role-specific profile object in a paginated envelope.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size. Default is 20 and max is 100.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort field whitelist for the users list.

patch.description: Admin-only endpoint. Updates the base user fields and the role-compatible profile fields only.

400.description: Validation error or role-incompatible profile fields

409.description: Duplicate email, phone, or role-specific unique field

patch.description: Admin-only endpoint. Disabling a user immediately revokes all refresh tokens for that user.
Makes the selected academic year the only active academic year.

post.description: Creates a semester inside an academic year. Semester dates must stay within the academic year range.

Creates a teacher assignment. teacherId is the teachers.id value, not users.id. The service also validates that the class belongs to the selected academic year and the subject belongs to the same grade level as the class.
Creates a supervisor assignment. supervisorId is the supervisors.id value, not users.id.

Creates a password reset token for an active account when the identifier exists. Returns a generic success response to avoid account enumeration. The reset token is exposed only when AUTH_EXPOSE_RESET_TOKEN_IN_RESPONSE is enabled.
Creates homework. Teachers create within their own assignments and cannot send teacherId. Admins must send teacherId explicitly.

get.description: Paginated homework list for admin or teacher.
Returns one homework item with the full active class roster and submission state.

put.description: Partial upsert of homework submissions for allowed students in the homework class.

get.description: Returns homework for one student. Parents can access only linked children.

get.summary: Get parent-owned child transport live status
